name: aaif-events
description: Skills for running AAIF (Agentic AI Foundation) in-person and online events — event content writing (announcements, Luma pages, LinkedIn carousels, recaps, speaker bios/invites, day-of slides, attendee reminders) and chapter ops (spin up a new city chapter or online event series, triage community intake, clean intake data, sync accepted organizers into the chapters list, and push/sync events to Luma with live RSVP stats).
